2606.26807.title: KARLA: Knowledge-base Augmented Retrieval for Language Models
2606.26807.paper_summary: We propose a new method that allows an LLM to automatically pull in factual knowledge from a knowledge base during token generation. This means that (1)~factual knowledge in the LLM output can be updated without retraining the LLM, (2)~facts in the LLM output can be traced to the knowledge base for transparency and explainability, and (3)~smaller models can achieve the same factual accuracy as larger models. Our core idea is to train the model to produce special tokens that trigger a query to the knowledge base. Our experiments show that our method improves factual grounding in both short and long-form generation, and allows factual revisions to take effect through KB edits rather than parameter updates.
2606.26807.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種新方法，允許大型語言模型在生成標記的過程中自動從知識庫中提取事實知識。這意味著 (1)~大型語言模型輸出的事實知識可以在不重新訓練模型的情況下進行更新，(2)~大型語言模型輸出的事實可以追溯到知識庫，以實現透明性和可解釋性，以及 (3)~較小的模型可以達到與較大模型相同的事實準確性。我們的核心思想是訓練模型生成特殊標記，以觸發對知識庫的查詢。我們的實驗表明，我們的方法在短文和長文生成中都改善了事實基礎，並且允許通過知識庫編輯而非參數更新來實現事實修訂。
2606.26807.author: Francois Crespin et.al.
2606.26807.authors: Francois Crespin, Fabian M. Suchanek, Nils Holzenberger
